speaking.descriptor: Completes the speaking task at A1 level.
Maintains communication with appropriate support.
Uses level-appropriate grammar accurately.
Uses suitable words and phrases for the topic.
Pronunciation is understandable and increasingly controlled.

writing.descriptor: Answers the writing task at A1 level.
Ideas are arranged clearly with appropriate linking.
Uses level-appropriate grammar accurately.
Uses suitable topic vocabulary.
Spelling, punctuation and layout support meaning.
